blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,078 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
